nonBlockingIssues.description: The fix_apt_errors helper in strategies module has unused logic bug - creates malformed commands but isn't used in main code path
The fix_install method marks strategies as 'Fixed' based only on looks_like_valid_install() check without actual Docker execution - could document suggestion vs verifier design more explicitly
RecheckerConfig derives Clone but contains only Copy types - could derive Copy for simpler usage, but Clone is fine and more future-proof
The rechecker integration does not persist the successful alternative install command back to the task's install_config - fix is ephemeral for this run only
Container restart logic duplicates code from lines 318-335 - could be refactored into a helper function
The setup error detection only checks if install command exit code != 0 - could be enhanced to detect specific error patterns
Default parallelism is 1, not 6 as specified in task requirements - documented as intentional in handoff

sharedStateObservations.observation: All workers followed documented AGENTS.md conventions: proper error handling with thiserror, tracing for logging, BTreeMap for deterministic serialization, async Send + Sync compatibility
Workers followed rust-dev-worker skill procedure correctly: read existing code first, designed to match existing patterns, wrote tests before implementation, verified with full test suite
The rechecker module has excellent module-level documentation including usage examples, setting a good standard for other modules

Comprehensive test coverage across all features: 17 unit tests + 10 integration tests in rechecker, 3 config tests in harness, 8 integration tests in workspace_validator, 70 total related tests passing

rechecker-module.summary: Well-designed implementation with error detection, alternative install strategies for 5 languages, max 3 attempts, and fixed install_config export

harness-rechecker-integration.tests: 3 new config tests + 454 total tests pass
harness-rechecker-integration.summary: Successfully integrates rechecker for automatic SetupError retry with fresh containers and iterative fix strategy

validator-rechecker-integration.summary: Clean integration of rechecker into WorkspaceValidator with with_rechecker_config constructor and fresh_container_revalidation support

cli-fix-tasks-command.tests: 70 related tests pass (27 rechecker + 24 harness + 19 workspace_validator)
cli-fix-tasks-command.summary: Full swe fix-tasks CLI implementation with recursive workspace discovery, parallel processing, and incorrigible task reporting
